mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `t_skill_external_catalog_item` (`dedupe_key`, `external_id`, `name`, `summary`, `pack_url`, `license_note`, `source_url`, `stars`, `sync_batch`) VALUES
(#{e.dedupeKey}, #{e.externalId}, #{e.name}, #{e.summary}, #{e.packUrl}, #{e.licenseNote}, #{e.sourceUrl}, #{e.stars}, #{e.syncBatch})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `external_id` = VALUES(`external_id`), `name` = VALUES(`name`), `summary` = VALUES(`summary`), `pack_url` = VALUES(`pack_url`), `license_note` = VALUES(`license_note`), `source_url` = VALUES(`source_url`), `stars` = VALUES(`stars`), `sync_batch` = VALUES(`sync_batch`)
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `t_skill_external_catalog_item`
AND ( LOWER(`name`) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(IFNULL(`summary`, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(`pack_url`) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(IFNULL(`source_url`, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(`external_id`) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOWER(IFNULL(`license_note`, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
